Author: SaMo (fork: Originaljsx)
Name: PvP Tracker (API 15)
Punchline: PvP match history and stats tracker — Dalamud API 15 fork.
Description: Record, browse and filter your Crystalline Conflict, Frontline and Rival Wings match history, view match scoreboards and view aggregated statistics like win rate and average damage dealt per match. Community fork of wrath16/PvpStats restoring compatibility with Dalamud API 15 (FFXIV patch 7.5).
Changelog:
* End-of-match per-player rollup: counts of events involving each player, buff applies/removes initiated, deaths caused/suffered, plus the sum of buff Param values applied (a starting proxy for shield potential — true effective shielding requires decoding obfuscated NetworkAbility damage values, planned for next iteration).
* New /pvpstatsrollup command re-runs the rollup over every completed CC match (useful after upgrading).
* Fixed source/target field positions and Param capture for status apply/remove events.
* CSV export now includes the seven new rollup columns.
